Document:
# Courier SOP This is the list of procedures, responsibilities, and duties of the [color=#846326]Courier[/color] of this station.
1. Couriers must ensure that all incoming mail is delivered within 20 minutes of its arrival on station.
2. Couriers are not permitted to open the mail of other crew members.
3. Couriers are expected to carry out the role of a Cargo Tech if the department is understaffed and are bound by the same laws as Cargo Techs when doing any Cargo work.
4. Couriers are to ensure the mail teleporter(s) are turned off in the event they are required to stop delivering mail.
5. Couriers are not permitted to force their entry into other departments for the purpose of delivering mail.
6. In the event a Courier is unable to locate the recipient of a delivery, they are to make a reasonable effort to contact the recipient via radio, and leave their mail in a location convenient for the recipient to retrieve it.
